{# Adapted from: - djangoproject.com/docs/templates/docs/genindex.html - sphinx/themes/basic/genindex.html #} {% extends "layout.html" %} {% set title = _("General Index | Django Documentation") %} {% set page_title = _("General Index") %} {% block toc_wrapper %}{% endblock %} {% block current_page_title %}{{ page_title }}{% endblock %} {% block body_wrap %}

{{ page_title }}

{%- for letter, _ in genindexentries %} {{ letter }} {% if not loop.last %} |{% endif %} {%- endfor %}

{%- for letter, entries in genindexentries %}

{{ letter }}

{%- for name, contents in entries %}
{# contents.0 is a list of links for the item #} {%- if contents.0 %} {{ name }} {%- else %} {{ name }} {%- endif %}
{# contents.1 is a list of subitems #} {%- if contents.1 %} {%- for subname, sublinks in contents.1 %}
{{ subname }} {% for link in sublinks[1:] %}, {{ _("[Link]") }}{% endfor %}
{%- endfor %} {%- endif %} {%- endfor %}
{%- endfor %} {% endblock body_wrap %}
